# Scripts

This directory contains project-maintained scripts only.

The ColabFold AlphaFold2_batch workflow is intentionally **not** included here as an exported `.py` file. It should be run via the official ColabFold notebook:

```text
https://colab.research.google.com/github/sokrypton/ColabFold/blob/main/batch/AlphaFold2_batch.ipynb
```

Project-specific ColabFold result parsing is stored in:

```text
structural_validation/process_colabfold_results_final6_memory_safe.py
```
